steps.title: Spot the correction
steps.content: The first sentence presents an assumption that offshore and land-based wind farms of similar size produce the same amount of energy. The second sentence corrects that assumption by saying Amrumbank West's turbines produce more.

steps.title: Choose a corrective transition
steps.content: Choice B would introduce an example supporting the assumption, Choice C would present a result, and Choice D would mark a sequence. The second sentence corrects the expected equality by showing what actually happens. The answer is A.
